name: Expansion Name Tags
description: Displays survivor name tags with configurable visibility, safezone/territory restrictions, and color/distance tweaks.
overview:
DayZ Expansion Name Tags allows players to see the name of another survivor. The feature can be tweaked to show only the username without the icon, or restrict visibility to safezones only (or territories as well if Expansion BaseBuilding is loaded).

You can customize the colors and distances.

## Key Features

- **Proximity-Based Display** — Names only appear when players are within a configurable range
- **Safezone/Territory Restriction** — Optionally show name tags only inside safezones or territories
- **Customizable Colors & Distances** — Full control over appearance

### Integration with Other Mods

- Combined with **Expansion AI**: Display nametags on NPCs and show the faction name
- Combined with **Expansion Hardline**: Display the rarity of the held item in the player's hand
installation: Ensure Expansion Core is installed and loaded.
Add @DayZ-Expansion-Name-Tags to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start the server to generate Name Tag configuration files.
Configure visibility range and display settings.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify Enabled is set to 1 and MaxRange is above 0. Check the mod is loaded after Core.
Set OnlyShowForGroup to 1 to restrict tags to group members only.

useCases.title: PvE Friendly
useCases.description: Enable name tags with a generous range so players can identify each other easily.

useCases.title: Group Only
useCases.description: Set OnlyShowForGroup to 1 so only party members see each other's names — maintains PvP tension with strangers.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Enable or disable the name tag system.

quickSettings.name: MaxRange
quickSettings.description: Maximum distance in meters at which name tags are visible.

quickSettings.name: OnlyShowForGroup
quickSettings.description: Only show name tags for players in the same group/party.

quickSettings.name: ShowOnAim
quickSettings.description: Show name tags when aiming at a player.

useCases.title: PvE Friendly
useCases.description: Enable name tags with a generous range so players can identify each other easily.

useCases.title: Group Only
useCases.description: Set OnlyShowForGroup to 1 so only party members see each other's names — maintains PvP tension with strangers.

useCases.title: Name tags not appearing
useCases.description: Verify Enabled is set to 1 and MaxRange is above 0. Check the mod is loaded after Core.

useCases.title: Names showing for enemies
useCases.description: Set OnlyShowForGroup to 1 to restrict tags to group members only.
